fields.name: player
docs: Player who placed the bet.

fields.name: round
docs: Round in which the bet was placed.

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount of lamports bet.

fields.name: isClaimed
docs: Boolean that indicates if the prize for a winning bet has been claimed.

fields.name: roundNumber
docs: Number of the round.
Starts at 1 and increments by 1 for each new round.

fields.name: poolAmount
docs: Lamports pooled from all bets in this round.

fields.name: isSpun
docs: Boolean indicating if the round has been spun and is awaiting VRF callback.

fields.name: outcome
docs: The number that won (0-36, with 37 representing 00)

fields.name: admin
docs: Authority of the table.

fields.name: minimumBetAmount
docs: Minimum bet amount in lamports.

fields.name: currentRoundNumber
docs: Number of the current round.

fields.name: nextRoundTs
docs: Timestamp when round can be advanced.

fields.name: roundPeriodTs
docs: Timestamp for how long each round lasts.
Round/bet PDAs in pairs: [round1, bet1, round2, bet2, ...]. Length must be even.

errors.name: invalidQueue
errors.message: Oracle queue does not match
docs: InvalidQueue: Oracle queue does not match

errors.name: invalidBetAmount
errors.message: Bet below minimum bet amount
docs: InvalidBetAmount: Bet below minimum bet amount

errors.name: mathOverflow
errors.message: Math overflow
docs: MathOverflow: Math overflow

errors.name: invalidPlayer
errors.message: Player does not match
docs: InvalidPlayer: Player does not match

errors.name: invalidRound
errors.message: Round does not match
docs: InvalidRound: Round does not match

errors.name: roundNotReadyToSpin
errors.message: Round has not finished yet
docs: RoundNotReadyToSpin: Round has not finished yet

errors.name: invalidRandomness
errors.message: Unable to map randomness to valid BetType
docs: InvalidRandomness: Unable to map randomness to valid BetType

errors.name: insufficientRemainingAccounts
errors.message: Length of remaining accounts must be even
docs: InsufficientRemainingAccounts: Length of remaining accounts must be even

errors.name: invalidBet
errors.message: Bet does not match
docs: InvalidBet: Bet does not match

errors.name: betNotWinning
errors.message: Bet is not a winning bet
docs: BetNotWinning: Bet is not a winning bet

errors.name: invalidMinimumBetAmount
errors.message: Minimum bet amount must be greater than zero
docs: InvalidMinimumBetAmount: Minimum bet amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: invalidRoundPeriod
errors.message: Round period must be greater than zero
docs: InvalidRoundPeriod: Round period must be greater than zero

errors.name: unauthorizedAdmin
errors.message: Admin does not match the one in table
docs: UnauthorizedAdmin: Admin does not match the one in table

errors.name: roundOver
errors.message: Round is no longer accepting bets
docs: RoundOver: Round is no longer accepting bets

errors.name: roundAwaitingOutcome
errors.message: Round outcome is not yet available
docs: RoundAwaitingOutcome: Round outcome is not yet available

errors.name: insufficientVaultFunds
errors.message: Vault has insufficient funds to pay out winnings
docs: InsufficientVaultFunds: Vault has insufficient funds to pay out winnings

errors.name: invalidBetType
errors.message: Bet type is illegal
docs: InvalidBetType: Bet type is illegal

errors.name: winningsAlreadyClaimed
errors.message: Winnings have already been claimed for this bet
docs: WinningsAlreadyClaimed: Winnings have already been claimed for this bet

errors.name: invalidAddress
errors.message: Address cannot be default pubkey
docs: InvalidAddress: Address cannot be default pubkey

errors.name: vaultNotWithdrawable
errors.message: Vault does not have enough funds for withdrawal
docs: VaultNotWithdrawable: Vault does not have enough funds for withdrawal
